data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for outcome tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Outcome tracking (won/lost/partial)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or API reads that confirm this specific functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for outcome tracking, yet the prior step evidence focuses on other aspects of the booking and financial processes without addressing this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to assert that this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of outcome tracking (won/lost/partial).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the outcome tracking requirement.
